chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No. S – 181 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 15.04.2024 Mr. Sikandar Sadar Siddiqui, Associate of Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Najeebullah Jalbani, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 10..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for applicants has filed a statement not pressing this civil revision application on the basis of compromise between the parties. Accordingly, this civil revision application is dismissed as not pressed in view of such statement. J U D G E Abdul Basit
